---
title: ""
pagetitle: "OQuant Data Science Consulting — Rodrigo Hermont Ozon"
description: "OQuant Data Science Consulting: econometrics, forecasting, risk analytics, machine learning and generative AI applied to business decisions. Founded by Rodrigo Hermont Ozon."
toc: false
---

::: {.rh-section}

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; gap:2rem;">
  <div style="flex:1 1 380px; min-width:280px;">
    <div class="rh-kicker">OQuant Data Science Consulting</div>
  </div>
  <div style="flex:0 0 auto;">
    <img src="assets/oquant_logo.png" alt="OQuant Data Science Consulting logo" style="max-width:160px; width:100%; border-radius:50%;">
  </div>
</div>
```

## Turning data into defensible decisions

OQuant is an independent data science consultancy founded in March 2025 by Rodrigo Hermont Ozon — economist, econometrician, and PhD researcher in Systems and Industrial Engineering. The premise is simple: business decisions deserve the same rigor as peer-reviewed research. OQuant combines econometric modeling, statistical validation, and modern AI engineering to deliver analyses you can defend in front of a board, an auditor, or a regulator — not black boxes, and not slideware.

:::

::: {.rh-section}

```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">Services</div>
```

## What OQuant does

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr)); gap:1.1rem;">
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>📈 Forecasting &amp; Time Series</h3>
    <p>Demand, price, and volatility forecasting with classical econometrics (ARIMA, GARCH-family, GAMLSS, Bayesian MSGARCH) and machine learning hybrids — with honest out-of-sample validation, not curve-fitting.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🔬 Econometric Modeling &amp; Causal Inference</h3>
    <p>Answering "what actually drives this?" — regression diagnostics, panel and instrumental-variable methods, quasi-experimental designs, and Bayesian multicausal models grounded in economic theory.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🎲 Risk Analytics &amp; Simulation</h3>
    <p>Quantitative risk measurement and scenario analysis: Monte Carlo simulation, extreme value modeling, portfolio and multi-objective optimization for pricing, sourcing, and investment decisions.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🤖 Machine Learning &amp; Predictive Modeling</h3>
    <p>Supervised and deep learning models (including CNN+LSTM architectures and survival analysis for predictive maintenance) built with proper feature engineering, ablation testing, and MLOps discipline.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>📊 Business Intelligence &amp; Decision Support</h3>
    <p>KPI frameworks, dashboards, and analytical pipelines that turn scattered data into a single, trusted view — from data modeling and governance documentation to executive-ready reporting.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>💬 Generative AI for Business</h3>
    <p>Practical LLM applications: internal chatbots, multi-agent and sub-agent workflow orchestration, and AI-assisted knowledge management — designed around your processes, with measurable value.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.rh-section}

```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">Selected clients</div>
```

## Organizations OQuant has served

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr)); gap:1.1rem;">
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🩺 Grupo Fleury</h3>
    <p>Consulting work for one of Brazil's leading healthcare and diagnostic medicine groups.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🌾 Aurora Alimentos</h3>
    <p>Consulting work for one of Brazil's largest food industry cooperatives.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🎓 Cogna Educacional</h3>
    <p>Consulting work for one of Brazil's largest education companies.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

Client engagements are confidential; sector references are shared with permission and project details remain under NDA.

:::

::: {.rh-section}

```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">How I work</div>
```

## A disciplined engagement model

```{=html}
<div class="rh-timeline">
  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Step 1</div>
    <h3>Diagnostic</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">Understand the decision, not just the data</div>
    <p>We start with the business question and the decision it must inform. I audit the available data, map the constraints, and define success criteria before a single model is fit. If the data cannot support the question, you hear that on week one — not at delivery.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Step 2</div>
    <h3>Modeling &amp; validation</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">Rigor before results</div>
    <p>Candidate models are built, stress-tested, and compared against honest baselines with out-of-sample and backtesting protocols. Assumptions are documented, uncertainty is quantified, and every result comes with its limitations stated plainly.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Step 3</div>
    <h3>Deployment &amp; handoff</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">Production code, not a PDF</div>
    <p>Deliverables are reproducible: versioned code, documented pipelines, and dashboards or APIs your team can own. I train your people so the solution outlives the engagement.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-tl-item">
    <div class="rh-tl-date">Step 4</div>
    <h3>Monitoring &amp; advisory</h3>
    <div class="rh-tl-org">Models drift; decisions evolve</div>
    <p>Optional ongoing support: performance monitoring, model recalibration, and advisory sessions as new questions emerge — so the analytics keep pace with the business.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.rh-section}

```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">Why OQuant</div>
```

## What you are actually buying

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr)); gap:1.1rem;">
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🎓 PhD-level rigor</h3>
    <p>Active doctoral research in multi-objective optimization, Bayesian econometrics, and time series at PUCPR, an MSc in Economic Development (UFPR), peer-reviewed publications, and reviewer roles for journals such as <em>Applied Soft Computing</em>. The methods behind your project are the ones surviving academic scrutiny.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>🏭 15+ years of industry track record</h3>
    <p>Hands-on delivery inside large organizations — Volvo Group, BRF, CNH Industrial, Unimed — plus UNDP/UN research work and years of economic analysis for industry federations. I know how corporate data, politics, and deadlines actually behave.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>⚙️ End-to-end capability</h3>
    <p>From statistical theory to production code: econometric specification, Python/R/SQL implementation, cloud data pipelines (Azure, Databricks, PySpark), and MLOps. One consultant covers the full path from hypothesis to deployed system.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="rh-logos">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rhozon/site/refs/heads/master/volvo_logo.jpg" alt="Volvo Group">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rhozon/site/refs/heads/master/brf_logo.jpg" alt="BRF">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rhozon/site/refs/heads/master/cnh_logo.jpg" alt="CNH Industrial">
  <img src="assets/unimed_logo.png" alt="Unimed do Estado do Paraná">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rhozon/site/refs/heads/master/pnud_logo.jpg" alt="UNDP Brazil">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rhozon/site/refs/heads/master/fiep_logo.jpg" alt="FIEP">
</div>
```

:::

::: {.rh-section}

```{=html}
<div class="rh-kicker">Next step</div>
```

## Let's talk about your problem

A first conversation costs nothing and usually clarifies whether quantitative modeling can move your decision — and whether I am the right person to build it.

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.8rem; margin-top:1rem;">
  <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-primary" href="https://wa.me/5541988382904">Book a conversation</a>
  <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/rodrigohermontozon/">LinkedIn</a>
  <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="mailto:rodrigoozon@yahoo.com.br">Email</a>
</div>
```

:::
